title: Cobblemon: Research Tasks
description: Adds Research Tasks Similar To Pokemon: Legends Arceus to Cobblemon
body:
## Cobblemon: Research Tasks adds **+6000** tasks for you to complete
**There are 5-8 tasks per pokemon and including tasks for every single one of the 1025 Pokemon.**

This mod has a default set of tasks and rewards for every single pokemon and its fully playable from the get go after installing in both your singleplayer world and server, but Modpack creators and Server owners can configure most aspects of it, including, removing/adding tasks for each pokemon and changing required amounts, changing the rewards for each pokemon and lastly changing the rewards of the 7 Tiers of Total Completion of the Research Book, the **Research Book** is obtained as soon as you enter the world for the first time, but can also easily be crafted.

### There are currently 8 possible tasks 
**Lets use a pokemon that has all 8 tasks, like Blastoise for example:**

- Evolve Wartortle into Blastoise (0/1)
- Defeat Pokémon with Blastoise (0/30)
- Defeat Flygon with Blastoise (0/3)
- Defeat Grass-type Pokémon with Blastoise (0/10)
- Reach 100+ friendship with Blastoise (0/100)
- Level up Blastoise (0/30)
- Fish up Blastoise (0/1)
- Ride Blastoise for 3000 blocks (0/3000)

Some pokemon only have 5 or 6 tasks because they either aren't fishable or don't have a pre-evolution, or aren't ridable.

### I'm also the Lead Developer of "Cobblemon: Legendary Monuments"

**I plan to keep updating both, some of the future things you can expect in this mod are:**


- Quick compatibility with 1.7 once it launches and new tasks associated with riding, etc
- Hopefully more tasks and changes from your feedback
- A new currency and vendor that allow you to buy multiple things, including new items
- A Neoforge port
- UI update
- More......

Your Feedback is very important me, right now the 6000 tasks are made by categorizing all pokemon according to multiple parameters, which means some tasks for certain pokemon could have inflated requirements, so if you want to contribute and make your own custom tasks you can DM me on discord or @ in the Legendary Monuments server and i'd be glad to take a look and potentially replace the current tasks with yours, ideally all 1025 pokemon would have custom tailored tasks and requirements and rewards. You can find the jsons in your config folder after you open the game for the first time with this mod installed.


**Special Thanks to beibeihuli_ for making the sprite for the book, the sprite for the checkmark and the sprite for the reward symbol (gift) and to Sevonents and Inazuma for helping out in the development too.**
